name: weline/module-customer
description: Weline Framework front customer management module

suggest.weline/module-currency: Adds currency dictionaries to the customer account shell.
suggest.weline/module-i18n: Adds locale dictionaries to the customer account shell.
suggest.weline/module-order: Adds order dictionaries to the customer account shell.
suggest.weline/module-seo: Adds SEO dictionaries to the customer account shell.
suggest.weline/module-shipping: Adds shipping dictionaries to the customer account shell.
suggest.weline/module-theme: Enables authenticated customer accounts for Theme previews.
